testcase.name: test_rate_limit_5_per_minute

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected rate limit 429 in burst, got codes: [200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200] assert 429 in [200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_contact_api.py:109: in test_rate_limit_5_per_minute assert 429 in codes, f"Expected rate limit 429 in burst, got codes: {codes}" E AssertionError: Expected rate limit 429 in burst, got codes: [200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200] E assert 429 in [200, 200, 200, 200, 200, 200, ...]
